entities.name: Salaul
entities.raw_quote: Ego sum vnus de vocatis spiritibus, ab aliis ad te missus, qui nominor Salaul, cui precipias quid tibi placet petere, et statim fiet.

entities.name: ritual circle with spirit names

attributes.function: conjuration of spirits for military vision and illusion

entities.raw_quote: O Vsyr, Salaul, Silitol, Denior, Zaimo, Syrtroy, Ristel, Cutroy, Lytoy, Onor, Moloy, Pumiotor, Tamy, Dor, Ym, voco vos vt hie venire debeatis per consecracionem huius circuli...

entities.name: ritual boat conjuration
entities.raw_quote: Vt vbicumque sis possis habere nauem, in qua tu cum quibuscumque voles quocumque ferris- vadas: ieiunus b die lune...

entities.name: ritual horse conjuration
entities.raw_quote: Volo eciam tibi mittere- quomodo equus, hoc est spiritus in equi forma, possit haberi...

entities.name: ritual resurrection
entities.raw_quote: Cum volueris [in] aliquem mortuum infundere spiritum, ita quod viuus, [vt] erat prius,- videbitur...

entities.name: ritual invisibility
entities.raw_quote: Tracto eciam de arte invisibilitatis, hodie quasi ab omnibus ignorata.-

entities.name: human rib (dead)

attributes.use: engraved with names and used in boat ritual

entities.raw_quote: fer tecum vnam [21v] costam hominis siue mulieris mortui, quam primo acuere debes...

entities.name: marrow of the dead
entities.raw_quote: suffumiga ipsum cum medulla mortui, vt dictum est.

entities.name: iron key or stylus
entities.raw_quote: cum quodam clauo siue stilo ferreo fac circulum, vt hie apparet,- sculpiens in eo nomina et figuras ibidem apparcntes.

entities.name: horse bridle (unused)

attributes.use: ritual focus for horse spirit summoning

entities.raw_quote: cum quodam freno nunquam operato, et in loco secreto cum quodam clauo siue stilo ferreo fac circulum...

entities.name: gold ring

attributes.use: resurrection ritual; inscribed with spirit names

entities.raw_quote: Primo quidem ex auro anulum fieri facias. Eciam sculpta sint- in parte- exteriori hec nominal Brimer, Suburith, Tranauit...

entities.name: sword
entities.raw_quote: fac circulum cum quodam ense, et in ipso scribe cum dicto ense nomina et figura[s] vt hie apparet.

entities.name: white linen shroud
entities.raw_quote: Et predictum anulum bene teneas involutum in syndone albo.

entities.name: circle with double band and pentagram
entities.raw_quote: Figure on fol. 26r: a double circular band, with a pentagram inscribed. O Brimer, Suburith, Tranauit is inscribed in the outer band...

entities.name: circle with single band and crescent (ship)
entities.raw_quote: Figure onfol. 21v: a single circular band in which are inscribed the names Fyrin, Dyspil, Onoroy, Sysabel, Cotroy, Tyroy, Rimel and Orooth...

entities.name: circle with square and inner circle
entities.raw_quote: Figure on fol. 23v: a single circular band, with a square inscribed, and a circle inside the square...

entities.name: circle of protection
entities.raw_quote: ...michi in omnibus istis apparere faciatis castrum fortissimum, cum profundis foveis...

entities.name: Latin incantation (boat ritual)
entities.raw_quote: Fyrin (quod- sic dicas: O Fyrin), Dyspil, Onoroy, Sysabel, Cotroy, Tyroy, Orooth, Rimel, spiritus- habitatores aque...

entities.name: Latin incantation (spirit summoning)
entities.raw_quote: O Vsyr, Salaul, Silitol, Denior, Zaimo, Syrtroy, Ristel, Cutroy, Lytoy, Onor, Moloy, Pumiotor, Tamy, Dor, Ym, voco vos vt hie venire debeatis per consecracionem huius circuli...

entities.name: Latin incantation (horse ritual)
entities.raw_quote: O Lautrayth, Feremin, [et] Oliroomim, spiritus peccatoribus insistentes, ego, talis, in vestra virtute confidens, vos coniuro...

entities.name: Latin incantation (resurrection ring)
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro vos, omnes demones scriptos in hoc anulo - quem in manibus habeas...

entities.name: ritual duration (one quadrant)
entities.raw_quote: Memento quod ars predicta nisi vno quadrante durare non potest, nisi durabit vnum quadrantem vna vice...

entities.name: ritual timing (moon phase)
entities.raw_quote: ieiunus b die lune; ipsa die, luna crescente...

entities.name: ritual timing (Tuesday, waning moon)
entities.raw_quote: Primo enim, 6a luna, die Martis, ieiunus...

entities.name: ritual timing (Sunday before sunrise)
entities.raw_quote: Vero dominica die, ante solis ortum, accedas extra villam...

entities.name: ritual timing (Friday and Saturday night at tomb)
entities.raw_quote: et in ipso pone, ita quod moretur ipsa die Veneris et Sabbati die.

entities.name: ritual timing (third day at horse ritual site)
entities.raw_quote: Tercia vero dei, in vesperis, reuertaris illuc...

entities.name: ritual timing (sixth day at tomb)

attributes.function: timing requirement for resurrection ring activation

entities.raw_quote: Sexta vero die, cum predicto ense, reuerteris...

entities.name: ritual direction (orient)
entities.raw_quote: incipiendo ab oriente, sic dices: O Vsyr...

entities.name: ritual direction (west)
entities.raw_quote: ...hanc coniuracionem dices versus occidentem...

entities.name: ritual direction (south)
entities.raw_quote: ...dicendo versus meridiem hanc coniuracionem...

entities.name: ritual direction (north)
entities.raw_quote: ...similiter versus occidentem, deinde versus aquilonem et versus orientem...

entities.name: ritual fumigation
entities.raw_quote: suffumiga ipsum cum medulla mortui, vt dictum est.

entities.name: ritual circle destruction
entities.raw_quote: Quibus recessis, aboleas circulum...

entities.name: ritual burial of remains
entities.raw_quote: ...et costam subterra ibi.

summary: This chunk contains detailed ritual descriptions from the Munich Handbook of necromancy (CLM 849), as analyzed by Kieckhefer. It includes: (1) a military illusion ritual invoking spirits like Salaul and the 'armigeri' group to create phantom armies and fortresses; (2) a boat summoning ritual requiring a dead person's rib, fumigation with marrow, and invocation of eight water-dwelling spirits (Fyrin et al.); (3) a horse conjuration invoking three spirits (Lautrayth, Feremin/Oliroomim) using an unused bridle; and (4) resurrection magic involving a gold ring inscribed with demon names (Brimer, Suburith, etc.) and consecrated over five days in running water. Each ritual includes precise timing (moon phases, weekdays), directional requirements, circle diagrams, Latin incantations, and instructions for ritual construction/destruction.
key_passages: O Vsyr, Salaul, Silitol, Denior, Zaimo, Syrtroy, Ristel, Cutroy, Lytoy, Onor, Moloy, Pumiotor, Tamy, Dor, Ym, voco vos vt hie venire debeatis per consecracionem huius circuli...
Ego sum vnus de vocatis spiritibus, ab aliis ad te missus, qui nominor Salaul, cui precipias quid tibi placet petere, et statim fiet.
Fyrin (quod- sic dicas: O Fyrin), Dyspil, Onoroy, Sysabel, Cotroy, Tyroy, Orooth, Rimel, spiritus- habitatores aque, qui naues nauigantium periclitare conamini, ego vos coniuro et exorcizo...
O Lautrayth, Feremin, [et] Oliroomim, spiritus peccatoribus insistentes, ego, talis, in vestra virtute confidens, vos coniuro per ilium qui dixit et facta sunt...

Coniuro vos, omnes demones scriptos in hoc anulo - quem in manibus habeas, per Patrem et Filium et Spiritum Sanctum... vt in eo hec virtus existat, uidelicet quod quandocumque inposuero ipsum in digito alicuius mortui, vna uobis ipsum ingrediatur...
